mapper.sql: select depart_seq, plan_depart_time, cancel_flag, is_circular, direction, line_name, trip_type, plan_arrive_time, schedule_num, start_stop_name, end_stop_name from dim_schedules
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_num as scheduleNum, line_name as lineName, start_stop_name as startStopName, end_stop_name as endStopName, plan_depart_time as planDepartTime, plan_arrive_time as planArriveTime, cancel_flag as cancelFlag, direction FROM dim_schedules ORDER BY line_name, plan_depart_time

SELECT DATE(plan_depart_time) as date, COUNT(*) as totalSchedules, SUM(CASE WHEN cancel_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as canceledSchedules, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cancel_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / COUNT(*) * 100 as cancelRate FROM dim_schedules WHERE DATE(plan_depart_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(plan_depart_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT f.line_name as lineName, AVG(f.load_factor) as avgLoadFactor, COUNT(DISTINCT s.schedule_num) as currentSchedules, MAX(f.boarding_count + f.alighting_count) as maxHourlyFlow, CASE WHEN AVG(f.load_factor) > 0.9 AND COUNT(DISTINCT s.schedule_num) < 20 THEN '严重缺口' WHEN AVG(f.load_factor) > 0.8 AND COUNT(DISTINCT s.schedule_num) < 25 THEN '中度缺口' ELSE '正常' END as warningLevel FROM fact_station_flow f LEFT JOIN dim_schedules s ON f.line_name = s.line_name AND DATE(f.stat_time) = #{date} AND s.cancel_flag = 0 WHERE DATE(f.stat_time) = #{date} GROUP BY f.line_name HAVING AVG(f.load_factor) > 0.8 ORDER BY avgLoadFactor DESC
